title: Easy Sea Anemone Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Sea Anemone Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a simple sea anemone garden cartoon. Designed for young kids. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Sea sea anemones are predatory animals related to jellyfish, using stinging cells (nematocysts) in their tentacles to paralyze fish.
The sea anemone spends most of its life anchored to rocks, but it can slowly crawl along the seabed or detach to swim away.
